title: André Cerdini, Judge in Trial of Nazi Klaus Barbie, Dies at 96
summary_full: He calmly presided over the historic 1987 trial in which a French court, for the first time, convicted a Nazi official of crimes against humanity.
summary_public: He calmly presided over the historic 1987 trial in which a French court, for the first time, convicted a Nazi official of crimes against humanity.

FR.label: positive
